titleStmt.title: SII 29.138: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 138. (A.R. No. B. 623 of 1961-62.) KHAMBADA KŌṆE COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in a field called Kallu-toḍame.

It states that Vijayappa voḍeya son of Ratnappa voḍeya, while governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of Kṛishṇarāya mahārāya who was ruling over the empire from the capital Vijayanagara, made a grant of 20 ghaṭi-varaha-gadyāṇa equivalent of 50 Kāṭi-gadyāṇa, for the amritapaḍi offerings to Chandranātha and for burning a perpetual lamp there (in the basadi). The grant of money was made from out of the income from siddhāya tax of Kambada-kōṇe, a place of Bhanḍāra-sthaḷa of the palace situated within the village Kerugāla. The grant was made free of all taxes for the merit of the king. Mallarasa, the karaṇika of Bārakūru wrote this record.
It is dated Śaka 1438, [passed nine] Dhātu, Mārgaśira, śu. 15 corresponding to 1516 A.D., December 9, [Tuesday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ svasti namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cārave trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
ṁ la staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svasti śrī jayāda(ṁdaya) śālivāhana śakavaruśa
ṁ 1438 saṁdu voṁbhattaneya vartamāna dhātu saṁvatsarada mārgaśira
ṁ śu 15 lū śrī maṁnmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vī
ṁ ra pratāpa śrī vīra kṛṣṇarāya mahārāyaru vijayanaga
ṁ riya siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi sukhasaṁkathā vinōda
ṁ diṁda duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyāgi sakala varṁnnadhaṁ
ṁ rmāśramavanū pratipālisuvali Ā rāyara nirūpa
ṁ diṁda bārakūra rājyavanū ratnappavoḍeyara ku
ṁ māra vijayappavoḍeyarū pratipālisuva kāladalū
ṁ śrī kṛṣṇarāya mahārāyarige śatrukṣaya mitrārjita
ṁ Āyurārōgya Ayiśvaryyabhi Uradhiyāgabēkeṁ
ṁ du vijayappavoḍeyaru caṁdranāthasāmige Amru
ṁ tapaḍi naṁdādīptige dhāreyaneṟadu barasi koṭṭa
ṁ dharṁmma śāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma Aramane bhaṁ
ṁ ḍāra staḷada keṟagāla grāmada voḷagaṇa kaṁbhada
ṁ kōṇeya Ūravoḷage naṁma Aramanege tettu ba
ṁ ha sidhāyada hoṁnina voḷage caṁdranāthasvāmi
ṁ ge kuḷava kaḍidu dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭa kāṭi
ṁ ga 50 kaṁ ghaṭi varaha gadyāṇaṁ 20 Akṣāra
ṁ dalu varaha gadyāṇa yippattu yi hoṁnanū
ṁ sarvvamānyavāgi kuḷava kaḍidu dhāreya neṟadu ko
ṁ ṭeU caṁdranāthasvāmiya Amrata paḍi naṁdādīptiyana
ṁ ḍasi Ā caṁdrārka sthāyiyāgi
ṁ sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dhārā pūrvakavāgi
ṁ Anubhavisi bahiri yeṁdu
ṁ keṟagāla grāmada nāraṇa hebā
ṁ ra sōmanātha hebāra yiśvara hebāra kaṁbhada
ṁ kōṇeya gōviṁda hebāra
ṁ dake bārakūra karaṇika mallarasara baraha vi
ṁ jayapa voḍeyara vopa . śrī vītarāga . yīdharmmake Āro
ṁ baru Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyalū sāsira kavile ko
ṁ ṁda dōṣakke hōharu [.] śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
